channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Is Monster Hunter Stories 3 On Xbox Game Pass?
item.content:encoded:
Monster Hunter Stories 3 is the latest instalment in the RPG franchise, and it’s bound to be incredibly popular, especially amongst its die-hard fanbase. If you happen to be one of them and have an Xbox, now’s a great time to see if you can pick up for free with Game Pass.

The online games service remains as divisive as ever, with hefty price increases putting a dampener on a great line-up of available games. It’s undeniably great to have access to a huge library of games, and the roster continues to evolve, with new games added regularly.

If you’re wondering whether Monster Hunter Stories 3 is one of the many added to Xbox Game Pass, then you’re in the right place, as Insider Gaming has it all laid out below.

Can You Play Monster Hunter Stories 3 On Xbox Game Pass?

Monster Hunter Stories 3 is not coming to Xbox Game Pass at launch, so if you want to get your hands on it, you’ll need to pay full price.

It’s a bummer for sure, but it’s not entirely unexpected. Not many Capcom titles come to Xbox Game Pass day and date with launch, and it doesn’t look like Monster Hunter Stories 3 is changing the narrative any time soon.

  • More Insider Gaming: Cyberpunk 2077 Teased For Xbox Game Pass

That being said, there are plenty of editions for Monster Hunter Stories 3, so you’ll have a nice selection to choose from when purchasing the title. However, if you’re not too sure about picking it up straight away, it might be worth the wait, as its Xbox Game Pass status could change in the future…

Will Monster Hunter Stories 3 Ever Come To Xbox Game Pass?

Considering that numerous Monster Hunter titles have appeared on Xbox Game Pass in the past, there’s a strong chance that Monster Hunter Stories 3 could appear on the service in the future.

The likes of Monster Hunter World and Monster Hunter Rise have both appeared on Xbox Game Pass, so there’s every chance that Monster Hunter Stories 3 could feature on the service too. However, that’s pure speculation; just because it’s happened before, doesn’t guarantee that it could happen again.

  • More Insider Gaming: Is Marathon On Xbox Game Pass?

If you’re desperate to play the game on day one when it launches, your best bet is to simply purchase the game on your preferred platform. However, if you don’t mind a bit of a wait, it could be worth delaying your purchase to see if it arrives on Xbox Game Pass in the near future.

Will you be picking up Monster Hunter Stories 3? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Xbox Game Pass content, check out whether Crimson Desert or Resident Evil Requiem appear on the service.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/is-monster-hunter-stories-3-on-xbox-game-pass/

item.title: All Pokémon Go 30th Anniversary Pressure Rising Special Research Tasks & Rewards
item.content:encoded:
Pokémon fans continue to be treated well in 2026, with a slew of major releases celebrating the franchise’s 30th anniversary, and there are rewards to earn in Pokémon Go for completing the Pressure Rising Special Research.

Pokémon Go‘s 30th anniversary event began on March 3 and is due to run until March 9, forming part of the month’s packed calendar, which also includes the All Out Event next weekend, bringing back almost every Pokémon ever released in the game.

If you’re working your way through the Pressure Rising Special Research Tasks and want to know all the available rewards, Insider Gaming has you covered.

Pokémon Go 30th Anniversary Pressure Rising Special Research Tasks & Rewards

The Pressure Rising Special Research Tasks in Pokémon Go are split into six different parts. However, not all parts are available immediately.

Tasks in the Pressure Rising Special Research are relatively simple, providing a host of useful rewards, although they’re not exactly going to be a game-changer.

  • More Insider Gaming: How to Get Mankey in Pokémon Fire Red & Leaf Green

Rewards include additional Poke Balls, Incense, and Pokémon encounters, alongside additional rewards when all tasks in a specific group are ticked off.

The table below contains all of the Special Research Tasks and their rewards. More will be added when available.

Where Are The Rest of The Pressure Rising Special Research Tasks & Rewards?

Pokémon Go will add additional Special Research Tasks to the Pressure Rising group every day during the 30th anniversary celebration that runs until March 9.

Based on the schedule and how many groups there are to complete, additional Special Research Tasks will be added every day for the six days of the event.

  • More Insider Gaming: How to Get Running Shoes in Pokémon Fire Red & Leaf Green

The daily sets of Special Research Tasks shouldn’t take too long to complete and can be ticked off without much focus. Instead, simply go about how you usually would on Pokémon Go, and the tasks will be completed in the background.

What do you want Pokémon Go to add in 2026? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Pokémon, take a look at whether you should pick the Helix or Dome Fossil in Fire Red and Leaf Green, and see how Pokémon Pokopia has made history for the franchise.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Amazon’s God of War Series Adds Four Additional Characters
item.content:encoded:
The cast of Amazon’s upcoming God of War live-action series continues to grow, with four more characters added to the series.

Prime Video‘s series, which will follow the Norse themes of the 2018 God of War title, has begun development, and while no official release date has been set, news continues to filter out from production.

Four More Characters Added to God of War Series

As reported by Eurogamer, the God of War series has expanded Thor’s lineage with the casting of four characters, bringing Modi, Magni, Gna, and Thrud into the series.

Thor’s brothers, Modi and Magni, will be played by Louis Cunningham and Ben Chapple, while Evelyn Miller joins the show as Gna, Odin’s Valkyrie commander, and Island Austin will fill the role of Thor’s daughter Thrud.

According to Variety, Cunningham and Austin will be series regulars, while Chapple and Miller, in the roles of Magni and Gna, will have recurring roles.

Cunningham was a series regular in Marie Antoinette and had one appearance in Bridgerton, while Chapple is known for his role as Liam Flynn on Playing for Keeps.

Meanwhile, Miller’s previous appearances come from the likes of Gangs of London and Doctor Who, while Austin has a slew of upcoming releases, including Insidious: The Bleeding World.

The quartet join a packed cast in the God of Wars series, which features Ryan Hurst as Kratos, Ed Skrein as Baldur, Teresa Palmer as Sif, Callum Vinson as Atreus, Mandy Patinkin as Odin, and Olafur Darri Olaffsson as Thor.

What are your impressions of the growing cast in the God of War series? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more God of War, take a look at claims of a new spin-off title, and check out the first look at Kratos and Atreus in costume.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: NYT Mini Crossword Hints Today—Answers For Tuesday, March 3
item.content:encoded:
The NYT Mini Crossword is a popular, quick-to-complete word game to test yourself daily, but some of the puzzles can be difficult to complete, so here are some hints.

If you’ve found yourself stuck on today’s NYT Mini, Insider Gaming has some helpful hints and all the answers for the NYT Mini Crossword on Tuesday, March 3, 2026.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s edition of the NYT Mini Crossword. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How to Play NYT Mini Crossword

The NYT Mini Crossword is available to play on the New York Times Games app or website, but, as of September 2025, a New York Times Game subscription is required.

The NYT Games Subscription is priced at $6.95 per month, but there are introductory offers available for other NYT subscriptions that include games access, which might be worth considering.

Without a Games subscription, access to the NYT Mini Crossword is blocked.

NYT Mini Crossword Clues (March 3)

Here are all the clues provided for the NYT Mini Crossword for March 3, 2026.

Across

1 – When tripled, “That’s correct!”

5 – “F1” or “One Battle After Another”

6 – Make up for one’s sins

7 – Title filmn character who says “That’ll do, Donkey. That’ll do”

8 – Pocket Janglers

Down

1 – Words before “math” or “honors”

2 – What the world’s first chess set was carved from

3 – Highest digits in Sudoku

4 – Nerd

5 – Cover up

Additional Clues For NYT Mini (March 3)

Here are some additional clues to help you solve the NYT Mini Crossword on March 3, 2026.

Across

1 – Sound a doorbell makes, ___ dong

5 – Something you watch at the cinema

6 – Make amends

7 – Voiced by Michael Myers

8 – Crucial part of a piano

Down

1 – 1989 movie featuring Spike Lee

2 – Elephant tusk

3 – Near-perfect ratings

4 – Expert in something ‘uncool’

5 – Something a Mexican wrestler wears

All NYT Mini Crossword Answers (March 3)

Here are all the answers for the NYT Mini Crossword on March 3, 2026.

Across

1 – DING

5 – MOVIE

6 – ATONE

7 – SHREK

8 – KEYS

Down

1 – DOTHE

2 – IVORY

3 – NINES

4 – GEEK

5 – MASK

When is The Next Game?

The NYT Mini Crossword refreshes daily at 10 PM ET on weekdays and Saturdays, and at 6 PM ET on Sundays.

As such, the next NYT Mini Crossword will be available at 7 PM PT/9 PM CT/10 PM ET/3 AM GMT/2 PM AET.

What is The NYT Mini Crossword?

The NYT Mini Crossword was introduced in 2014 as a shorter and quicker-to-complete game to accompany the main New York Times Crossword, which was initially released in 1942.

Until September 2025, the NYT Mini Crossword was free, but it has now been consolidated into a monthly NYT Games Subscription alongside several other popular games.

Did you struggle with the NYT Mini Crossword today? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more word game help, take a look at hints for today’s Contexto, and check out tips for today’s Connections.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/nyt-mini-crossword-march-3-hints/

item.title: Today’s Contexto #1262: Hints & Answer For March 3, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, March 3, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: An admission pass
  • Hint 2: Typically purchased for entry
  • Hint 3: Golden _

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Reservation
  • Flight
  • Tour
  • Airline
  • Tix
  • Discount
  • Fare
  • Booking
  • Concert

Today’s Contexto Answer For Game #1262 On March 3, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Ticket

A Ticket is typically a piece of paper or card (or an electronic substitute) that gives the holder a certain right, be it to enter a place, travel somewhere, or participate in an event.

When Is The Next Contexto Game After #1262?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on March 4

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

Check out some of Insider Gaming’s other word-game guides down below:

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/todays-contexto-1262-hints-answer-for-march-3-2026/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: New GTA 6 ‘Leak’ Contains Footage Forgotten For Years
item.content:encoded:
Grand Theft Auto 6’s prospective fanbase has busied itself poring over a short snippet of the game uncovered in a recent claimed leak. It’s recent in that it was uploaded just one day ago, but according to the user who posted the clip, it’s more than four years old and was captured by a former Rockstar employee during the COVID-19-induced lockdown.

This clip allegedly predates the 2022 leaks that uncovered around 100 GB of footage and data from GTA 6, and while it’s short and sweet, it could reveal a couple of minor details.

Pinch of salt time, folks.

GTA 6 ‘Bridge Leak’ Emerges on Instagram

On Instagram, user ‘vice.city’alligator’ posted a few seconds of footage from a claimed early build of Grand Theft Auto 6. In the clip’s description, the user explained that the quality is ‘absolute s***e’ because it was sent via email years ago and was subjected to intense compression.

They explained: ‘Never thought I’d actually post it cuz its a nothingburger.’

The user then stepped away from the account and requested that nobody ask them any questions because they simply wouldn’t be around to answer them. Right?

Per the bold claim, the clip was sent to the uploader years ago by a former Rockstar employee. It was ‘recorded straight from a dev’s setup during lockdown’, and it shows a bridge over a large inlet, over which a Pißwasser beer truck drives. In the distance, we can see another bridge that seems to have some vehicular traffic coasting over it, which could give us a glimpse at some of the game’s intended scale.

We also see some other content, including a plane coursing through the sky at a substantial height, and a speedboat zipping by just beyond the bridge.

It’s not much, but that’s because it’s years old. It has been pointed out that it wouldn’t be tough to fabricate something like this, but the hopium is strong in this game’s aura.

From what we know, Grand Theft Auto 6 is still on track to be released on November 19. There’s every chance it could be delayed again, but Take-Two has now reiterated on numerous occasions that the date is locked in.

Are you excited to play GTA 6 this year? Let us know what you’re thinking on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Marathon developers are considering duo lobbies

Written by

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant's adoration for gaming started on the Amstrad CPC in 1996. Now, he's a multi-platform expert gamer with a deep love for the industry, a passion for esports, and more…

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/new-gta-6-leak-contains-footage-forgotten/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Marathon Developers Considering Dedicated Duo Lobbies
item.content:encoded:
In the final feedback form published by Bungie after the Marathon server slam, the team revealed an investigation into the potential for duo-exclusive lobbies. In Marathon, users can play solo, queue as a duo, or play as a trio, but there’s no dedicated duo option.

This has been picked up by Bungie as a point of contention, with many users requesting the feature to give themselves an easier time of things. Being a duo against guaranteed trios is never fun, and prospective fans of the new extraction title want to level the playing field a little.

Marathon Duos Could Be Coming at Launch

Marathon is set to hit the market in just two days, building on the semi-success of the recent server slam test. The ‘demo’ pulled in tens of thousands of players and racked up high viewership figures, but some pointed out that the player count withered pretty quickly.

In a post on social media, Bungie summed up everything it had learned from the server slam, uncovering everything the team is working on before the game launches. That includes the complex UI, concerns around PvP cadence, the economy system, and issues with ‘heat generation’ and general movement mechanics.

Another thing that was talked about was ‘Additional queue options‘.

The team wrote:

Currently you have the ability to run as a Solo (be it as Rook or as a Runner in a solo lobby), or you can queue in with a duo or a full trio – but we have heard the feedback about duo dedicated lobbies. This has been logged and shared with the team.

This isn’t any kind of promise that duo lobbies will surface, but it’s one step closer for those who want the feature. Admittedly, strict lobby sizing of this nature is something more reserved for battle royale titles, as most extraction games promote an unpredictable model that ensures you never know the size of the team you’re running into.

The best example of this is Escape from Tarkov, the spearhead extraction title that has been around for almost a decade. In Escape from Tarkov, you can run into a solo player or a five-man stack in the same lobby without any prior knowledge. The game doesn’t pick and choose who is matched with whom based on team sizes.

Would you want to see a duo feature implemented in Marathon? Let us know what you’re thinking on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that legacy Minecraft source code has leaked

Written by

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant's adoration for gaming started on the Amstrad CPC in 1996. Now, he's a multi-platform expert gamer with a deep love for the industry, a passion for esports, and more…

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

item.title: The Best RPG in Years Has Officially Joined Xbox Game Pass
item.content:encoded:
Little more than a year after release, Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 has joined the Xbox Game Pass service, presenting subscribers with one hell of a medieval marvel. Last year, Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 emerged to a stunning reception, receiving critical acclaim worldwide and going on to win some of the industry’s most prestigious awards.

In our review, we awarded the game perfect marks, and for good reason. As one of the most expansive, detailed, and immersive open-world RPG titles to be released in years, KCD2 deserved every shred of recognition it got.

And now, you can play it for free as part of your Game Pass subscription.

Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 is On Game Pass

We learned about KCD2’s imminent Game Pass arrival midway through February, but it’s only now that the game has officially landed on the platform. Users on Xbox and PC can download KCD2 for no extra cost, soaking up all that Warhorse’s RPG epic has to offer – provided you’re not on the Essential tier, that is.

Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 was one of 2025’s most decorated games. The title spawned an immense following, building on the success of the first game, which dropped in 2018. The follow-up title continued the story laid out in the first game, but blew it wide open, introducing an enormous world, hours upon hours of content, and some incredible acting, amongst other things.

It went on to receive three major expansions inside a year, showing immense cadence from Warhorse Studios.

Kingdom Come has joined the Game Pass service alongside Final Fantasy 3, a classic RPG that surfaced way back in 1990.

Do you intend to download Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 and give it a try? Let us know what you’re planning on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that old Minecraft source code has leaked

Written by

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant's adoration for gaming started on the Amstrad CPC in 1996. Now, he's a multi-platform expert gamer with a deep love for the industry, a passion for esports, and more…

item.title: Minecraft Source Code Leak Reveals Long-Forgotten Features
item.content:encoded:
Minecraft has suffered a massive leak that has uncovered legacy source code from way back in 2014. This code is tied directly to the game’s older versions, specifically those made for the PS3, PS4, Xbox 360, and Xbox One, and dataminers have busied themselves uncovering every shred of information possible from what’s available.

There’s even information pertaining to the PS Vita port, which was one of the most short-lived versions of the game, given the console’s relatively contracted lifespan.

Minecraft Legacy Leak Uncovers Expired Source Code

Tech-minded social media users have been sharing all kinds of content from the Minecraft source code leak that hit the airwaves just a day or two ago. They’ve been trying to rebuild these old versions of Minecraft, the likes of which have long since disappeared from storefronts worldwide.

The older builds that they’ve managed to dig into contain forgotten or failed elements that Mojang and 4J Studios abandoned, such as floating islands and visual effects for waterfalls.

On Reddit, users discussed the implications of the source code leak, with one user writing:

Does this mean there is a chance we can now use modern blocks, mobs, & items in 360 edition?

Thus, we don’t need to buy Bedrock or Java to use modern items?

One of the more tech-savvy users reported that ‘work is already underway and they’ve even managed to run the code on an RGH-modded Xbox 360.’ This was after a Discord server was circulated, populated by folks looking to make the most of the leak. Later reports suggest the Discord server was banned.

Another user explained, when asked if this will ‘make Minecraft free’:

I highly doubt it, all this will do is finally let others make mods for the ps3/xbox360 versions of the game, or make custom title updates with things say from newer versions of the game. This leak will more than likely not affect the current version of Minecraft.

In one shot uploaded to Reddit, user PhoenixSC revealed a file repository that showed the extent of what had been uncovered. The expansive breakdown included several gigabytes of data.

Are you eager to get your hands on the legacy source code for Minecraft? Let us know if you’re interested in the retro versions of the game on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that PUBG Black Budget has been cracked by dataminers

Written by

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant's adoration for gaming started on the Amstrad CPC in 1996. Now, he's a multi-platform expert gamer with a deep love for the industry, a passion for esports, and more…

item.title: Massacre Codes (March 2026)
item.content:encoded:
Use these Roblox Massacre monthly redeem codes to get your hands on plenty of rewards, including lots of free credits.

Massacre is a Roblox horror survival experience that assigns players to either Survivors or a Killer. The Killer must hunt down and eliminate every survivor without mercy, while the Survivors must run, hide, and fight to stay alive by any means necessary. This intense asymmetric horror game transforms each match into a deadly game of hide-and-seek where every heartbeat could be your last.

Players can also purchase gamepasses to enhance their experience, including items like Permanent Bandages, Bear Traps, Bloxy Cola, and Pepper Spray, as well as abilities like Push and Super Push to gain tactical advantages. Created by Abyssal Covenant and released about two years ago, Massacre has attracted over 5 million visits.

Although items and advantages are earned through gameplay, the fastest way to gain an edge is by redeeming promo codes that developers release. These codes grant free rewards and boosts so players can improve their survival chances and unlock exclusive items instead of grinding through countless terrifying matches.

Active Massacre Codes

Expired Massacre Codes

  • omg500k
  • smallbugfix
  • tyeveryone
  • 400k
  • 500members
  • 300ktuff
  • byebyebye
  • perks
  • 200kwow
  • loveyall
  • Meow

How to redeem Massacre Codes

Use the following steps to activate all the codes in Massacre Codes:

  1. Boot Massacre in Roblox and spawn into the game
  2. Click on the cog/gear icon on the left-hand side of the screen
  3. Scroll to the bottom and find the code redemption text box
  4. Type or paste in the code
  5. Then click on enter to claim the freebie

Where to get more Massacre Codes

Massacre codes are typically released through the game’s official community and developer channels, but they do not appear automatically in-game. The best places to catch them early are the official Massacre Discord server, which usually has an announcements or codes channel where new codes are shared first, and Abyssal Covenant’s social media pages, where updates, milestones, and event rewards for the game are announced.

Codes often come out around major updates, player milestones, or special events. Still, if you only check occasionally, it’s very easy to miss them since Massacre does not notify players when a new code drops or when one expires. Because of this, the easiest strategy is to save this guide in your browser and check back instead of trying to monitor every source yourself.

This page is refreshed as soon as new codes go live, and any expired codes are removed promptly, so you always see only the ones that are still active.

Enjoying our Roblox games codes coverage? Check out the codes for popular games like Steal A Brainrot, Radiant Residents, and Fix It Up on Insider Gaming!

Interested in the latest developments in the world of gaming and esports? Then join the Insider Gaming Discord server and engage with the passionate community.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: PUBG Black Budget Cracked by Dataminer Who Reveals Test Maps
item.content:encoded:
PUBG: Black Budget is one of this year’s more highly anticipated extraction shooters. It underwent a closed alpha in December that drew in a few thousand players, all eager to see how the game would stack up alongside the likes of ARC Raiders and Escape from Tarkov.

Black Budget has promise, but it’s built around a confusing blend of battle royale and extraction gameplay mechanics that might put some players off. Regardless, dataminers are hard at work finding out what they can about the game, and one user on social media recently reported cracking the KRAFTON-backed title wide open.

Black Budget Broken Into

On social media, user Shawn Weber reported cracking Black Budget, forcing the game to load and to play matches locally, despite the title being offline since the playtest closed midway through December.

In a follow-up post, the dataminer uncovered images of developer test maps, showcasing a series of environments in which the game’s creators could demo character models, weapons, movement mechanics, and more.

One of the shots included some gnarled creature, the kind that wasn’t seen in the game’s demo, which proved to be a fairly barren experience, devoid of most forms of life.

Black Budget has a unique premise, but it might end up getting lost in the complexity of the thing. In this extraction game, an anomaly is swallowing the game map over time, slowly strangling extraction points and key areas of the game world.

Most of the exfiltration in the game is done via dynamic wormholes that can be generated at the press of a button, eradicating ‘fixed’ extraction sites that we’ve seen for years in competing extraction games.

It fuses PUBG’s battle royale mechanics with KRAFTON’s new extraction shooter design.

Black Budget doesn’t have a release date, nor is there any indication of when the next demo will arrive, but Weber might busy himself digging deep into the game’s files to see what else he can uncover.

Did you enjoy Black Budget’s demo? Let us know what you’re thinking on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Marathon’s UI might not change too much

Written by

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant's adoration for gaming started on the Amstrad CPC in 1996. Now, he's a multi-platform expert gamer with a deep love for the industry, a passion for esports, and more…

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

item.title: Marathon Developer Says The UI Won’t Have Its ‘Sauce’ Removed
item.content:encoded:
Marathon launches in just a couple of days, following the semi-successful server slam that took place last weekend. The testing period drew in hundreds of thousands of players across all platforms, stress-testing the game for Bungie and uncovering some of the game’s most critical issues.

One of those more glaring issues concerned the game’s UI. It was found to be overly complex by many, boasting unnecessary visuals, far too much clutter, and awkward navigational elements. Bungie has said it’ll iterate on the UI, but one of the game’s UI designers has suggested that won’t happen.

What’s The Deal With ‘Fontslop’?

Marathon’s user interface designer, Elliott Gray, recently popped up on social media in response to a UI ‘redesign’ by a Marathon player. The redesign in question oversimplified the game’s layout, which drew a comment from the self-proclaimed ‘fontslop merchant’.

If there’s one leading debate amongst Marathon players, it’s that the game boasts a needlessly complex UI and visual palette, and that naturally includes the many fonts that make up the game’s front end. It’s a little bit too cacophonous for some.

When user LukeCB14 posted an image of the ‘simplified’ Marathon, Gray wrote:

all jokes aside there’s plenty of work we can and will do as a team to respond to player feedback about inventory management, navigation, density of info, etc…

…but don’t think for a second that we’re gonna remove the SAUCE from the UI.

Marathon’s former art director, Joseph Cross, wrote on social media that the game boasted ‘an embarrassment of riches’ in the graphics space. He parted ways with the project last year, but has remained positive about the game’s delivery since.

Gray’s post has racked up almost 200,000 impressions and generated a widespread debate regarding Marathon’s UI… Again. It has been recognized as one of the biggest points of contention by Bungie, leading the studio to promise a reiteration of the appearance post-launch, but to what depth, nobody knows.

Many have argued that Marathon’s full visual palette is one of the only things that’ll help it stand out from the competition in the extraction space.

Do you like how Marathon looks? Let us know what you’re thinking on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that a new Fallout developer might have revealed itself

Written by

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant's adoration for gaming started on the Amstrad CPC in 1996. Now, he's a multi-platform expert gamer with a deep love for the industry, a passion for esports, and more…

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

item.title: Capcom Spotlight Set for March 5
item.content:encoded:
A Capcom Spotlight presentation is set for this Thursday, March 5. The company announced the upcoming presentation on social media.

Among the games featured will be Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection, PRAGMATA, Street Fighter 6, Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection, and Mega Man Dual Override.

Dual Override is one of the only games announced that doesn’t have a release date. It was first shown off at the 2025 Game Awards. Monster Hunter will be released next Friday, March 13. Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection will be released 2 weeks later, on March 27.

PRAGMATA is slated for release on April 24, and Street Fighter 6 has been on the market for quite some time.

The event will be broadcast at 2:00 p.m. PST and 5:00 p.m. on the East Coast. The presentation will be about 35 minutes in length. It’s also noted that it will be broadcast in 13 languages and that the date and time can change without notice. The presentation will also feature certain age-restricted titles.

Capcom is currently firing on all cylinders following the release of Resident Evil Requiem. The game is one of the best-reviewed titles of 2025 and an early contender for game of the year. Check out how to solve that game’s final puzzle here.

What are you hoping to see at the next Capcom Spotlight event? What kind of surprise games, if any, do you think there will be?
